data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve account metrics for date range
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves aggregated analytics metrics for the specified account within a given date range. Requires the account token for authentication. Accepts start_date and end_date parameters to define the reporting period. Returns AccountMetrics object containing performance data such as views, engagement, and other key metrics for the account during the specified timeframe.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve top performing videos for account
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the top-performing videos for the specified account within a given date range, ranked by engagement or performance metrics. Requires the account token for authentication. Accepts start_date and end_date parameters to define the reporting period. Returns AccountTopVideos object containing a ranked list of videos with their associated performance metrics during the specified timeframe.
